name: SOUNDHOUND AI, INC.
summary: SoundHound AI, Inc. is a global leader in conversational intelligence offering independent Voice AI solutions. The company provides businesses with AI-driven products including Smart Answering, Smart Ordering, Dynamic Interaction, Employee Assist, and SoundHound Chat AI. Built on proprietary Speech-to-Meaning and Deep Meaning Understanding technologies, SoundHound serves automotive, TV, IoT, and customer service industries, processing billions of interactions annually for enterprise clients via its Houndify developer platform.

products.name: Smart Answering
products.description: AI-driven customer service product for handling inbound inquiries via voice.

products.name: Smart Ordering
products.description: AI-driven voice ordering product for restaurant and food service industries.

products.name: Dynamic Interaction
products.description: Voice AI product enabling dynamic conversational interactions for businesses.

products.name: Employee Assist
products.description: Voice AI product designed to assist employees with workplace tasks and queries.

products.name: SoundHound Chat AI
products.description: Powerful voice assistant with integrated Generative AI capabilities.

products.name: Houndify
products.description: Open-access developer platform with Voice AI technology and over 100 content domains.

products.name: Amelia 7
products.description: AI agent orchestration platform enabling multiple agents to carry out tasks and transactions, including in-vehicle use.

products.name: SoundHound Music App
products.description: Music identification app launched in 2009 with over 300 million downloads.
